creator: wing@mail.stic.gov.tw
text:
>You need to:

>b) Perform an nm /kernel | sort and locate the function that
>   contains the instruction 0xc01f7758.
> nm /kernel | sort | grep c01f7

c01f7464 t ffs_indirtrunc
c01f771c t acquire_lock
